violations.text: Thermometers observed to be lacking in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Hood vents observed with an accumulation of grease/dust/debris. Hood vents are to be properly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025
Lid to the ice machine is in poor repair and doesn't close properly. New lid has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

The dishwasher is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Per PIC, air gap will be installed today. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

The chlorine concentration of the sanitizing solution of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Service call placed during inspection and 3-bay sink is being used to sanitize until dishwasher is repaired and at proper sanitizing concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Ambient temperature of the beverage/stuffie reach-in unit was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Stuffie observed with temperature of 47 degrees F. Ice observed at the back of the unit. In addition, prep unit observed with an ambient temperature of 51 degrees F. No food products observed in this unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call placed during inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in these units until they are serviced and at consistent temperatures at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Ice machine located in the trailer was not in good repair. The lid has come off the hinge resulting in an inability to close properly. In addition, upper/lower beverage/stuffie unit and 4-door reach-in freezer observed with ice buildup. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and refrigeration shelving/gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

The dishwasher is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food/food equipment is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

Ambient temperature of the chowder/soup lowboy unit observed at 47 degrees F. degrees Chowders in this unit observed with temperatures between 50 and 56 degrees F. Inspector thermometer calibrated. Voluntary disposal during inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call has been placed. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is maintaining consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

Thermometer is lacking in the refrigeration unit that holds beverages and stuffies. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. All cold hold equipment must be checked for accurate thermometers. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. In addition, a large area of dried food residue observed on the bottom of the 4-door reach-in, and ice build-up observed at the back of the beverage/stuffie reach-in. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned often enough to prevent such build-up. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
